title: Jumerian
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Species |image= |name=Jumerian |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{CSWECite|II|179|Jumerian}} |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|That doesn't sound good. How angry will Princess Leia be?''»
«''That depends on what he's smashing. If it's the singing lamp the Jumerians gave her as a wedding present, she might even thank him.|translated=1|Mallatobuck and Chewbacca upon hearing their son, Lumpawaroo, ransacking the Solos' apartment|''[[A Forest Apart]]''}} The '''Jumerians''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Jumeria system/Legends|Jumeria system]]{{Planetnamia|species=Jumerian|system=[[Jumeria system/Legends|Jumeria system]]|legends=1}} of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' Some Jumerians later became members of the [[New Republic]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa/Legends|wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa]] to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. a number of Jumerians presented [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] with a [[singing lamp]] as a gift for her [[Wedding of Han Solo and Leia Organa/Legends|wedding]]. Although she disliked the item, she kept it in the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscanti]] [[Solos' apartment|apartment]] she shared with her [[Marriage/Legends|husband]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[A Forest Apart]]'' to [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]]. the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] visited the apartment with their [[Chewbacca's family/Legends|son]] [[Lumpawaroo/Legends|Lumpawaroo]], who began rummaging through the space. As the [[Parent/Legends|parents]] listened to objects breaking inside, Solo commented that while his [[Gender/Legends|wife]] might be angry about the damage depending on what items were affected, she would probably appreciate if the Jumerians' singing lamp was one of the items broken. ==Behind the scenes== Jumerians were first mentioned in the [[2003]] [[eBook]] novel ''[[A Forest Apart]]'', written by [[Troy Denning]]. ==Appearances== *''[[A Forest Apart]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Core Worlds sentient species]]
